case_title: MARVIN ALFONSO MIRANDA VS. BEN T. WONG

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MIRANDA, MARVIN ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, MARVIN ALFONSO
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-25-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-11-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT." (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, MARVIN ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN T.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-28-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-25-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL-BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS, THAT ADDRESS DOES NOT EXIST IN THE CCSF". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, MARVIN ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN T.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, MARVIN ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN T. CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-28-2013 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
